params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: ★★ gamma : keepalive SSE comment fix (L-049/V7-G pattern). Per #777 verdict: SSE EventStream parses 0 events despite gen 200 OK, UI shows 'Unable to complete request' error. Similar to perplexity #769 V7-F era. V7-G fix that worked: added ': keepalive\n\n' comment line BEFORE event:message — forces fetch+ReadableStream progressive flush in Chrome before END_STREAM. Applied same pattern to gamma_sse_v7 envelope: 916→928 bytes. Same scenario as #777 — outline generation. Engine state unchanged (no rebuild).

notes: gamma L-049 keepalive pattern — proven on perplexity V7-G. DB-only fix.
